message.content:
@startuml

package "Controller" {
  class MainController
}

package "Model" {
  class User
  class MedList
  class Calendar
  class UserAppearenceInfo
  class Disease
  class Med
  class Day
  class Food
  class Reminder
  class Task
}

package "DataBase" {
  class DAO
  class DAOUser
  class DAODisease
}

User "1" --> "1" MedList : has
User "1" --> "1" Calendar : has
User "1" --> "1" UserAppearenceInfo : describes
User "1" --> "*" Disease : has

MedList "1" *-- "*" Med : contains
Calendar "1" *-- "*" Day : contains

Day "1" --> "*" Food : contains
Day "1" o-- "*" Reminder : contains
Day "1" --> "*" Task : contains

DAOUser --|> DAO
DAODisease --|> DAO

MainController ..> DAO : gets and updates information
MainController ..> User : manipulates and updates

@enduml
